target: 23. Air Raid Alert
(Gasp!)
...Enemy... bombers... Split into five groups... heading north up the Kii Channel.
—Citizens of Wakayama City, we pray for your safety.
It's an air raid alert!!!
What did you say!?
Everyone, gather around me!! I'll protect you with a barrier of hair!
Ushio-san!!!
Stay down! Ryunosuke-kun!!
(Ushio!! Don't cast a shadow on the ground! Fire is bad!! Minimize your main body!!)
I'm fine!! Shadows don't die in Tokoyo!! This is nothing!!
Ahahahahahahahahaha!!
Nothing can reach me... No matter how much you slugs crawling on the ground struggle.
Ushio-chan... Once I turn you into a charred daruma doll, I think I'll take that eye...
Hehe... It's so much easier not having to hold back or worry about accidentally killing you...
Ugh...!! Shide...!!
(Ushio! Continuing from what we were talking about earlier...)
(If Ushio's eye can't use its power in Tokoyo... That means Shide plans to steal it and use it in the real world, right?)
(Then that means there's a way to return to the real world!?)
I get it! Shinpei!!
We must erase Hiruko... If Ushio hacks her, it should be possible...
If Hiruko disappears... Tokoyo will disappear too! Then we should be able to return to the real world!
Bring it on!! But how!? Shide is way up in the sky...!!
Leave it to me... This air raid is Hiruko's memory...
Memory?!
Tokoyo is connected to Hiruko's memories. What happened on this day should be a past she doesn't want to remember...
Shide... he forced it...!!
Ushio, jump out on my signal. I also have memories of the day of the air raid!
I cannot erase them since I am no match for Hiruko, but I should be able to hold the memories back for a short while.
It will only be for a few seconds... But I will create a path... for you to reach Shide!
A path?!
Do ya trust me?
...I trust you!! If you're my sister's friend, then you're our friend too!
Sorry for pointing my gun at you earlier.
Ryunosuke…
Hey... Shinpei!!
(Yeah!!)
Thank you...!!
Also, there's something I need to tell you.
Shide-sama's armor can return any force directed at it right back at the attacker. Like a yamabiko.
Yamabiko…
(I see... so that's why...)
If your hacking gets reflected back at you!?
That would be a fatal wound for you too.
No way!
Shide-sama will definitely use the yamabiko. Especially now that Ryunosuke's two-second foresight is sealed...
(What should we do!? Hacking is the only way to defeat Shide...!)
(Erase the armor, and kill what's inside. We need "two moves"! But then Ushio will be killed right after erasing the armor!!)
No, I won't die.
(What!?)
I have that thing Mio gave me!! No matter what happens, I'll finish it on the second move!!
(So you have a trump card...)
I'll end everything! Before my hair burns out...!!
I'm ready whenever!
...Right!
Wha...!? Time stopped—
I'm counting on you, Ushio... Stop Shide-sama.
Please... put Hiruko... out of her misery...
(Ushio! We're counting on you!!)
Leave it to me!!!!
Using the <color=#GF_TIPS_059>incendiary bombs</color> Hoine stopped as footholds...! All the way up to where Shide is...!!
Ushio-san is going all the way up...! Damn it...!! Is there nothing I can do but watch from here...!?
(...Don't look away, Ryunosuke-kun!)
(Burn it into your eyes...!! She's definitely going to win!!!)
Ushio
Shide!!
I see... You've made an ally out of Hoine...
(It'll take a few minutes of direct contact to completely erase Hiruko!! Defeating Shide is the top priority!!)
At this altitude, I can't catch Ushio-chan's plane...
(Fast and heavy!! Machine gun bullets!! My hair won't be able to block them all!)
(I need to stabilize my posture. If I land on the aircraft...!)
But if you land... Your shadow—your plane will be visible!
(He's planning to blow up my plane along with the fighter jet!?)
(Even if I can't die in Tokoyo, if I get blown to pieces, it'll take time to recover! He'll steal my right eye in the meantime!!)
Ugh...!! The foothold won't last any longer! In that case...!
Even if it costs me my life, I'll kill you!!!
(...Huh? What was that feeling just now!?)
(This guy... could it be... There's nothing inside!?)
...Even if it costs you your life...?
(Oh no!! This won't be a mutual kill!!)
You knew about my yamabiko...? Look, your attack is coming right back at you!
Ah! Ushio-san is being blown to pieces by her own attack...!
(It's okay, Ushio won't die in Tokoyo...!)
(She managed to catch her eye right before it was blown to pieces too.)
(And Shide, you're probably thinking this right now...)
(That it would be easy to steal her eye from her blown-apart body...)
(But that's not going to happen! Ushio has the trump card Mio prepared for her!)
She regenerated...!? ...She ate something! Probably a part of the real Ushio!!
So that's why you challenged me even knowing about the yamabiko...!!
Alright, she ate a strand of the real Ushio's hair and regenerated!
What did you do…!?
The B-29 disappeared...!! Was the memory of the air raid erased in that split second of contact!?
